migration_map.notes: Custom mode VPC mapped to AWS VPC with DNS support
Public subnet with auto-assign public IP
Machine type n1-standard-4 mapped to m5.xlarge
Machine type n1-standard-2 mapped to t3.large
Cloud SQL to RDS PostgreSQL 14, added deletion_protection
Added KMS encryption, removed public access
Pub/Sub subscription to SQS with DLQ
Cloud Function to Lambda, upgraded to Python 3.11
Service account to IAM role with instance profile
GKE SA to EKS node IAM role
